message:
feat(html_export): implement tool badge popover JavaScript

Add ToolPopovers controller with:
- Show popover on hover (desktop) and focus (keyboard)
- Toggle popover on click (mobile support)
- Escape key to close
- Overflow badge expansion ("+X more" to "Less")
- Smart positioning (viewport overflow handling)
- Outside click to close
- Re-initialization after decryption
- Build popover from data attributes if not inline
- Accessible: aria-expanded, role=tooltip, keyboard navigation

Also fix minor clippy warning in renderer tests.

Implements br-1v5c: Task 3.5 - Implement Popover JavaScript in scripts.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
